title: Send folder is not set up
creator: unity3
content:
You sent six codes which I did not get on my Android phone. I had to go online to get the code numbers. Something's wrong with this all.

Nothing is going into any of the sent folders that I have sent, I am not getting emails, like your codes, properly and I'm using this account for business.

I cannot find a way to refresh Mozilla, nor can I find a way to associate my sent folder to receive sent emails although my server is not having this problem showing them.

I've read directions on Google I can't even get to anything like that to make a change.

Please help please advise what's wrong with this? Thank you, Deborah
